summary: Defer wrapper output parsing fix discovered during TASK-20260429-009 to a dedicated Tier 2 task

details.tier_reason: Modifies wrapper code (scripts/run-generator.mjs) and adds operational fallback path. Multiple files affected including a fixture and the operating guide. No product runtime impact but operational surface change.
details.branch: task/TASK-20260429-010 (to be created when implementation starts)
details.reason_for_task: Discovered in TASK-20260429-009 (BUG-2): Claude Code --json-schema does not constrain result field text content. Generator may return natural-language report while file changes are correct. Current wrapper JSON.parse on result throws and prevents AGENT_RESULT_RECEIVED with PENDING_VALIDATION. Need git-diff-based deliverable verification path.
details.deferred_reason: User opted to continue Validator-A external execution in a separate Codex session before implementing this fix. Fix not blocking immediate user workflow.

next_action: Resume from this Task after Validator-A external session completes.

summary: Implemented Generator wrapper output parsing fallback

implementation: Accept JSON-shaped result field when valid
Classify plain result text as natural_language and synthesize Generator result only after target-file diff verification
Record output_processing, changed_files, and diff_summary in generator-run metadata
Add parser fixture check to audit:harness

redaction.notes: No secrets or environment variable values recorded.

summary: Local validation passed for wrapper parsing fix
